\brag pages
About Submit

Submit

How to submit

  1. 1. Fork the repository

    Start by forking the repository on GitHub. This creates your own copy to make changes in.

  2. 2. Add your entry

    Open src/data/brags.json and paste your generated JSON at the end of the array.

  3. 3. Open a pull request

    Open a pull request titled Add [Your Name]. That's it — no account needed beyond GitHub.

Your entry

0 / 200
your entry 
{
  "name": "",
  "brag_url": "",
  "description": ""
}

Paste this object at the end of the array in src/data/brags.json
